title: Remove duplicate Copy Link button on paper detail page
description:
On paper detail pages (e.g., /paper/bem_2011_feeling), there are TWO 'Copy Link' buttons — one below the paper thumbnail/header area and another in a separate SHARE section further down. This is redundant. Remove the second/duplicate one (the one in the SHARE section), keeping only the primary one near the top of the page.

Do NOT output any thinking or explanation. Output ONLY search/replace blocks.
